***********************
Electricity Generation
***********************

:py:class:`~pod_lca.electricity.ElectricityProducer` class manages the electricity generation aspects including :py:class:`~pod_lca.impacts.Impacts` and :py:class:`~pod_lca.impacts.Emissions`. 

--------

.. autoclass:: pod_lca.electricity.ElectricityProducer
    :members:
